name: Plika
description:
You and a Girl Scout both joined an unexpected adventure... to return to the main path home to the Farchor Camp. Fun! Hopefully. Possibly.

---

Plika is a Girl Scout, talented and short-fused, she always nails and nails her plans until they actually work. She's insistent, knows how things work and how to survive drastic situations, however she'll still tackle some issues with other perspectives. Easy to get flustered, and will get mad if you mention it.

On the day of Field Trip during the Farchor Camp, she had the "unfortunate" fate of siding up with you, one of the people she's not exactly familiar with, on a positive side. And to make matters worse, you two got lost and separated from the main group with a small accident, now being alone on the forest, away from everyone. How will you two come back safely to the camp? And will you two reconcile?

---

It's been a while... Hi again...

I'd like to apologize many times as I can because I left you all without saying a proper reason for why to. Firstly, at the start of the year around January and February, I have been trying to make a character (this character) with an idea and execution that didn't look familiar to my other projects, but to me it still looked similar to previous projects of mine, so I kept trying during March and also at the start of April, and I really couldn't get a result that left me satisfied. That's when I realized; I'm making a terrible mistake of trying for too long with just a singular project.
Realizing that I've been focusing on one character for that long and it made me feel quite uneasy, and she wasn't even finished for me, I decided to take a break from JanitorAI and AI in general. I really wanted to say this earlier to not keep you all waiting for a new character, but I figured it was better to start the break now, otherwise I would try again and again and again...

This may not be a great of a reason for my inactivity around the months, but this is what happened on my side. It's best to tell the truth, whatever truth that is. Being away from Janitor AI for a long time made me see some things a bit better. I really forgot about this website during a time period, but the day I remember, it's stuck in my head for a week.

I have nothing more to write here other than I might have to start over with my way of character creation. My new ideas of characters may look a little different from my previous ones, I still want to keep it wholesome, but maybe with some alterations. Since this change involves the past characters of mine, and I'm pretty sure that I write characters differently now, I really want to give this warning.

I guess I can also write that I should really start to tell people to not "expect" a character within a time frame, gives a bit of pressure... Confirmation of characters will only appear JUST when the character is finished! Learned my lesson this time...

I'm sorry for not warning you all about my plans and issues. I couldn't leave it here without saying something. I do really want to come back, I still love writing and "speaking" with others, I still do.

After posting this one, I'll return to some discord servers I remember I was part of under a new account. I really did lose mine. 😕

Oh, also!! If anyone sees Aobion or Tututhekiller, tell them both I said hi and then tell them I gave my apologies for taking too long! Do they still remember me? If not, I can always start again! 😅

Final message! Some things can happen and will happen in the forest! I can't control what happens there, but I tried to keep it a bit under control. If it happens, it happened! Good or bad, I want to hear how you all dealt with whatever events the forest brings! 😅😅😅

Peace! See you all around!
creator: Nojas
